title: QS Simulations: computational companions to the Quantum Social Physics framework
description: Neutral, shareable simulation companions to the Quantum Social Physics (QS) framework: a severe-test agent-based model of generalized vs. direct reciprocity (P2.4), an asymmetric machine-node propagation model (P2.5), and a parameter-free QQ-equality model-recovery study plus a live question-order harness for the 'society of LLMs' order-vs-count experiment (P3.2-M). Built to refute the framework's predictions, not confirm them.
